campaign_arc.arc_description: Start with pride (28%), build to pride, close with warmth/gratitude

concept:
### 1. CONCEPT NAME
"لمسة اعتزاز | Touch of Pride"

### 2. CONCEPT DESCRIPTION
This campaign celebrates the beauty and elegance of national heritage through our exclusive abaya collection, inspiring pride in our identity. As we honor our roots, we invite our community to embrace this limited-time collection, designed for the modern woman who loves tradition.

### 3. VISUAL WORLD
We will create a golden hour ambiance, utilizing warm golden light to evoke feelings of nostalgia and pride. The color palette will incorporate rich earth tones with accents of deep greens and royal blues, symbolizing Saudi heritage. Textures will blend luxurious fabrics with traditional embroidery, set against outdoor backdrops such as majestic desert landscapes, enhancing both comfort and elegance. The mood will be inviting and reflective, inviting viewers to feel both anticipation and warmth.

### 4. STORYBOARD
- **Frame 1: [Opening hook — anticipation]**
  A panoramic shot of the sun setting over the vast desert, golden light illuminating a figure in a flowing abaya standing atop a sand dune, the wind gently swaying the fabric. Text overlay: "A new dawn of elegance."

- **Frame 2: [Build tension]**
  Close-ups of the intricate embroidery and fabric details as hands touch and admire the abaya. Subtle sounds of traditional music start, slowly intensifying and incorporating crescendos to build excitement.

- **Frame 3: [Hero moment — product/brand reveal]**
  The model transforms into full view, gliding down from the dune to a vibrant market scene, where other women admire her abaya. A tagline appears: "Our Heritage, Your Style."

- **Frame 4: [Cultural connection — heritage/community]**
  A diverse group of women adorned in the new collection, joyfully reaching towards one another while celebrating National Day. In the background, traditional decorations and accessories highlight community ties.

- **Frame 5: [Close — call to action]**
  The scene shifts to a retail store during golden hour, warmly lit, displaying the new abaya collection with "Limited Time Offer" banners. Text overlay: "Join us in celebrating - Shop Now!"

### 5. CAPTION
"تألقي بفخر مع مجموعتنا الجديدة من العباءات 🇸🇦✨ احصلي على لمستك الخاصة قبل انتهاء العرض المحدود!"

### 6. MOOD REFERENCE
The look and feel will embody a fusion of tradition and modern elegance, combining the warmth of cultural heritage with a contemporary fashion sensibility that invites joy and connection amongst the community.
